title: Copis Maintenance
description: A Maintenance System, You cant join now!
body:
#

Copis Maintenance

# Features ## Toggle Maintenance Mode - Server operators can toggle maintenance mode with `/maintenance`. - Shows clear status feedback when enabling or disabling. ## Restrict Player Join - Non-operator players are automatically prevented from joining while maintenance mode is active. - Ops can still join and manage the server during maintenance. Works on Fabric and compatible plugin servers.
